name: claude-code-arabic-fix
description: Fixes Arabic & Hebrew RTL in the actual Claude Code chat panel — no mirror panel, no lag. Type and read RTL in the real chat. Auto-re-applies after every Claude Code update. إصلاح العربي داخل Claude Code نفسه
author: Ahmed Aqlan (Era Group)
